events.title: OSPO Monthly Knowledge Exchange: Roadmap Workshop for JupyterHub and Binder Share Out
events.description: Knowledge exchange and roadmap workshop for JupyterHub and Binder.

events.title: CRELS speaker series with Julien Migozzi: "Algorithms of Distinction: Class, Credit Scores, and Property in South Africa"
events.description: A speaker series talk on algorithms, class, credit scores, and property in South Africa.

events.title: Sick Plant Clinic
events.description: Our monthly Sick Plant Clinic is here to help! Bring plant samples to the clinic to receive advice.

events.title: AI & Society: Complicating simple stories about Chinese AI with Helen Toner
events.description: Helen Toner discusses common narratives about AI in China, compares them against evidence, and draws conclusions for the US AI ecosystem.

events.title: Stuck: How Money, Media, and Violence Prevent Change in Congress
events.description: Maya Kornberg explains how campaign costs, party power, violence, and social media fuel dysfunction in Congress.

events.title: Third Annual Contracts Theory Works in Progress Workshop
events.description: A workshop for works in progress in contracts theory.

events.title: Combating Public Corruption to Protect & Sustain Democracy: From Watergate to Now & Beyond
events.description: A discussion on combating public corruption and sustaining democracy, from Watergate to now and beyond.

events.title: Repeal of the Endangerment Finding: What it Means for Federal and State Climate Action
events.description: Discussion on the implications of repealing the endangerment finding for federal and state climate action.

events.title: Environmental and Energy Economics Seminar – Tatyana Deryugina
events.description: Seminar on 'Resilient or Scarred? Migration, Mortality, and Morbidity after Natural Disasters.'

events.title: POWER Conference on Energy Research and Policy
events.location: Spieker Forum, Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: Conference on exciting new research on energy markets and regulation from top-tier scholars.

events.title: Discussion | Chile Today: A Conversation with Javiera Manzi Araneda and Claudio Alvarado Lincopi
events.description: A discussion on current events in Chile with Javiera Manzi Araneda and Claudio Alvarado Lincopi.

events.title: 2026 Matsui Lecture: Congressional Power in Turbulent Times
events.description: Lecture discussing congressional power in an era of political volatility.

events.title: AI & Society: AI and Democracy with Larry Norden, David Evan Harris, and Ashish Goel
events.location: Morrison Library, Doe Library, UC Berkeley
events.description: Talk on AI and Democracy with experts from the Brennan Center, Stanford, and UC Berkeley.

events.title: Dissertation Talk: Scaling Environments and Verifiers for Software Engineering Agents
events.description: A dissertation talk on software engineering agents.

events.title: CS Seminar: Machine Learning for Structural Biology: From Single Structures to Visual Proteomics
events.description: A CS seminar on machine learning for structural biology, from single structures to visual proteomics.

events.title: Generative AI and Statistical Methods to Simulate Fine-Grained Mobility Patterns from Aggregated Data
events.organizer: Institute of Transportation Studies (ITS) & UC Berkeley Civil and Environmental Engineering
events.description: Serina Chang presents on generative AI and statistical methods for mobility patterns.

events.title: Practical Accessibility – Documents and PDFs
events.description: Hands-on session to learn how to design documents with accessibility in mind.
